title: ERP Sales Order — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw ERP sales order records from daily CSV files before ingestion into brz_freshsip.erp_sales_raw. CSV headers map to these field names.

order_id.description: ERP sales order identifier; combined with order_line_id for deduplication in Silver

order_line_id.description: Line item number within the order; combined with order_id to form natural key

quantity_ordered.description: Units ordered by the retailer; cast to INTEGER in Silver

quantity_shipped.description: Units actually shipped against this order; may be less than quantity_ordered for partial shipments; cast to INTEGER in Silver

invoice_price.description: ERP invoice price per unit in USD; authoritative price for margin calculations; cast to DECIMAL in Silver

order_date.description: Date the order was placed in ERP; cast to DATE in Silver

ship_date.description: Date the order was shipped from warehouse; cast to DATE in Silver

region.description: US geographic region of the order destination
